messages.meaning: No.1 boost pump pressure low in AFT tank. Auto-changeover to No.2 should have occurred.
messages.immediate: Check BOOST2 PRESS. If auto-changeover confirmed: pull No.1 CB. If BOOST2 PRESS also lit: STBY BOOST PUMP EMER (AFT) ON.

messages.meaning: No.2 standby boost pump pressure low in AFT tank. If both AFT lights on: both pumps failed.
messages.immediate: STBY BOOST PUMP EMER (AFT) ON → pull No.1 CB → if not restored: FUEL SELECTOR CROSSFEED.

messages.meaning: No.1 boost pump pressure low in FWD tank.
No.2 boost pump pressure low in FWD tank.

messages.immediate: Check quantity. Flicker on rotation: monitor. Steady in flight: fuel management.
